articles.author: Emma Carmichael, Illia Novikov
articles.title: Ukraine and 9 other countries announce a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles - AP News
articles.description: Ukraine and nine other countries have announced a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles, taking advantage of Kyiv’s experience of fighting Russia. Monday's agreement came at a meeting in Paris with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. The co…
articles.content: PARIS (AP) Ukraine and nine other countries announced Monday they were forming a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles, utilizing Kyivs experience in fighting Russias full-scale invasio… [+8177 chars]
